summary: Session issues and performance testing completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login flow verified - NO LOGIN LOOP. Jobs module tenant isolation working correctly - Ormond sees 1 job, Murphy sees 0 jobs.

login_api_performance.details: All login APIs respond in <500ms (Ormond: 0.299s, Murphy: 0.265s, Super Admin: 0.262s)

web_login_flow.details: Web frontend login works correctly - navigates to /dashboard after successful login. NO LOGIN LOOP detected for both student and super_admin users.

auth_me_endpoint.details: /api/auth/me returns correct user data including tenant_code and role

token_expiration.details: Token expiration set to 10080 minutes (7 days) as configured in TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES

jobs_tenant_isolation.details: SECURITY VERIFIED - Ormond student sees 1 job (Production Manager), Murphy Shark student sees 0 jobs. Cross-tenant isolation working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ jobs.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user for all endpoints ensuring tenant isolation
✓ Token expiration set to 7 days (10080 minutes) - appropriate for mobile apps
✓ Web App.js fetchUser properly handles localStorage token and network errors
✓ Login API performance is excellent (<300ms for all user types)
✓ Cross-tenant data isolation verified - Murphy cannot see Ormond jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session issues and performance testing completed. Key findings: 1) Login APIs respond in <500ms, 2) Web login flow works without loop, 3) Jobs module tenant isolation verified - Ormond has 1 job (Production Manager), Murphy has 0 jobs. Token expiration is 7 days. All security-critical tenant isolation tests passed.
